title: Season 3 Week 1 — Warzone only
sourceNote: Warzone table only, from Dot Esports: https://dotesports.com/call-of-duty/news/black-ops-7-warzone-season-3-week-1-challenges

weeklyChallenges.title: Black Ops Royale — complete activities
weeklyChallenges.description: Complete 15 activities in Black Ops Royale. Reward: 5,000 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: Black Ops Royale — Grapple Hook distance
weeklyChallenges.description: Travel 200 meters with the Grapple Hook in Black Ops Royale. Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: Black Ops Royale — Cradle Breach crates
weeklyChallenges.description: Open 5 crates inside a Cradle Breach in a single match (Black Ops Royale). Reward: 3,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: Black Ops Royale — Exotic weapon kill
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 1 elimination with Exotic weapons in Black Ops Royale. Reward: 2,500 XP.

weeklyChallenges.title: Warzone — Long Shot kills
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 3 Long Shot kills. Reward: 2,500 XP.
